_doc: PR #3.0 placeholder for the 3 worker children spawned by worker-pad-active. Replaced by wood-worker.json / essence-collector.json / worker-builder.json in PR #3.1 — the archetype name is the only thing that changes (worker-pad-active.json's OnSpawn list will switch to the proper three). Stand-in mesh is just character-player tinted grey so the build/visual flow can be verified end-to-end before AI lands.
